title: Twelve new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 26
summary: On May 26, YKHC reports twelve new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 12 are residents in: Atmautluak (1) Bethel (3) Chefornak (1) Kasigluk (1) Kwethluk (2) St. Mary’s (4) — COVID-19 Updates and Community Information Updated COVID-19 testing hours: In Bethel, COVID-19 testing...

title: EPA proposes protecting Bristol Bay from the Pebble mine
summary: The EPA just took an important step toward protecting Bristol Bay salmon, communities, and ways of life. Right now, you can help by making yourself heard. The post EPA proposes protecting Bristol Bay from the Pebble mine appeared first on Trustees for Alaska .

title: Three Waterfall Hikes Near Anchorage
summary: Photo of Virgin Creek Falls courtesy Paxson Woelber. Take advantage of snowmelt in the early summer to see these waterfalls at their peak flow. Thunderbird Falls These 200-foot falls are impressive to view and easy to access. Just north of Eagle River, the trail starts with a climb of about 100 feet...

title: Twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 25
summary: On May 25, YKHC reports twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta.
